XACT Structures

This section contains references for methods of the following XACT structures:

  • WAVEBANKDATA
  • WAVEBANKENTRY
  • WAVEBANKHEADER
  • WAVEBANKMINIWAVEFORMAT
  • WAVEBANKREGION
  • XACT_FILEIO_CALLBACKS
  • XACT_NOTIFICATION
  • XACT_NOTIFICATION_DESCRIPTION
  • XACT_NOTIFICATION_MARKER
  • XACT_PARAMETER_CONTROL_DESC
  • XACT_PARAMETER_ENTRY
  • XACT_PREPARE_SOUNDCUE
  • XACT_REALTIME_AUDIO_DATA
  • XACT_RUNTIME_PARAMETERS
  • XACT_SOUNDBANK_SELECT_VARIATION
  • XACT_SOUNDCUE_PROPERTIES
  • XACT_SOUNDSOURCE_PROPERTIES
  • XACT_WAVEBANK_STREAMING_PARAMETERS
  • XACT_WMA_PLAYLIST_ADD
  • XACT_WMA_PLAYLIST_PROPERTIES
  • XACT_WMASONG_DESCRIPTION
